description: Production-derived false block (frontend audit 2026-07-07): a best-practice reviewer blocked on 'neutral.subtle fails the 4.5:1 contrast requirement' when the token (#717279 on white) is 4.78:1 and passes AA. The claim is mechanically refutable by arithmetic, blocked three PRs before an author disproved it, and re-blocked afterward. The validator must return refuted (citing the disproof), so the claim is dropped and the clean PR approves.

evidence_trace: accessibility skill requires 4.5:1 contrast for normal-size text
finding.failure_scenario: Small body text in `neutral.subtle` renders below the 4.5:1 contrast ratio, so low-vision users cannot read it reliably.
finding.model_authored_prose: Accessibility - `neutral.subtle` on small body text does not meet the 4.5:1 contrast requirement; use `neutral.default` here.
